name: Alarms
preview: 07:00

show_label.label: Show alarm label
show_label.hint: Display the alarm name next to the time

show_when_no_alarms.label: Show when no alarms
show_when_no_alarms.hint: Keep the widget visible even when no alarms are set

sound_enabled.label: Play sound on alarm
sound_enabled.hint: Play a system sound when an alarm fires

rotate_upcoming.label: Rotate upcoming alarms
rotate_upcoming.hint: When more than one alarm is queued, cycle through the next five on the bar

rotate_seconds.label: Rotation interval (seconds)
rotate_seconds.hint: 1 or more. Time between alarm swaps on the bar
